hooks.command: cp $HOME/.claude/CLAUDE.md /Users/barney/code/sync-ai/CLAUDE.md; cp $HOME/.claude/settings.json /Users/barney/code/sync-ai/settings.json; cd /Users/barney/code/sync-ai && git pull --rebase --quiet 2>/dev/null || true; git diff --quiet && exit 0; git add CLAUDE.md settings.json && git commit -m "chore: sync $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" && git push --quiet 2>/dev/null || true
